<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Exception; /** * Interface for HTTP error exceptions. * * @author Kris Wallsmith <kris@symfony.com> */ interface HttpExceptionInterface extends \Throwable { /** * Returns the status code. */ public function getStatusCode(): int; /** * Returns response headers. */ public function getHeaders(): array; }
